# Set up project repository

Create the Git repository, initialize package.json, and configure TypeScript with strict mode.

# Configure CI/CD pipeline

Set up GitHub Actions for linting, testing, and deployment.

# Build user authentication

Implement login, registration, and password reset flows with JWT tokens.

# Create database schema

Design and implement the PostgreSQL schema with migrations.

# Implement REST API

Build the core API endpoints with Express.js and Zod validation.

# Write integration tests

Create end-to-end tests covering the full API surface.
